messages.text: Welcome to the LmDotnetTools mock provider host. This demo scenario streams a few canned turns so you can exercise the chat client end-to-end without an API key.
Here's a turn that includes a thinking block followed by a tool call so you can see how mixed content renders in the chat UI.

Edit samples/MockProviderHost/scenarios/demo.json (or supply LM_MOCK_SCENARIO=<path>) to script your own turns. After this turn the queue is exhausted and subsequent requests fall back to a single-line 'ok' reply.
